title: [lora_l2] deinit acquires then immediately releases lora_mutex (pointless)
close_reason: Fixed: Removed unnecessary mutex lock/unlock in lichen_lora_l2_deinit(). The callback pointer assignments no longer acquire lora_mutex because: (1) RX thread was already joined, (2) DEINITING state blocks new operations. Simplified the comment to explain why no mutex is needed.
